description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python Docker image with three stages: setup, lint, and test. In the setup stage add an Install Dependencies job that runs pip install virtualenv, virtualenv -p python3 env, source env/bin/activate, and pip install -r requirements.txt, then stores the env directory as an artifact that expires in one day. In the lint stage add a Check Code Style job that depends on Install Dependencies, runs source env/bin/activate and pycodestyle ctf_api blindfold tests. In the test stage add a Test API job that also depends on Install Dependencies, runs source env/bin/activate and nose2 -C. No caches, services, or deployment targets are defined.
